hooks.command:
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.md) bad=$(grep -nE '\]\((docs/|\./docs/|https?://docs\.spryker\.com|/docs/[^)#]*\.md[)#])' "$f" || true); if [ -n "$bad" ]; then printf 'Internal link format violation in %s:
%s
Rule: links must start with /docs/ and end with .html — no missing leading slash, no relative ./docs, no docs.spryker.com domain, no .md extension. Fix before continuing.
' "$f" "$bad" >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac
